title: FragmentReceiver missing window_size validation
description:
File: python/src/lichen/schc/reassembly.py:49

FragmentReceiver.__init__ accepts window_size but does not validate it. If window_size is 0 or negative, the position calculations in receive() will produce incorrect results.

Specifically:
- pos = self.window_size - 1 - frag.fcn (line 140) would produce wrong positions
- _window_bitmap() would produce empty or incorrect bitmaps
- _window_full() would behave incorrectly

FragmentSender correctly validates window_size at line 155-156, but FragmentReceiver does not.

Fix: Add validation in __init__:
  if window_size < 1:
      raise ValueError('window_size must be positive')

Category: CORRECTNESS
close_reason: Added window_size >= 1 validation in FragmentReceiver.__init__ (mirrors sender). Prevents bad pos/bitmap calculations. Reassembly tests pass.
